setting: Critical edition of 14th-century Middle High German chronicle (Brückstädter Chronik), preserved in three manuscripts and one early print

material_features.description: Red ink used for proper names throughout
material_features.informational_significance: Scribe distinguished proper names as a semiotic category through color — this is a deliberate editorial decision, not mere decoration

witnesses.title: Manuscript B
witnesses.relation_to_original: copy with additions by second hand

material_features.description: Text partially illegible on fols. 12–18 due to water damage
material_features.informational_significance: The damage is itself information about the manuscript's post-production history

material_features.description: Bull's head watermark dates the paper to ca. 1415–1425
material_features.informational_significance: Material property provides independent dating evidence

hands.description: Second hand, marginal additions and corrections

witnesses.title: First Printed Edition
witnesses.relation_to_original: derived from B or a now-lost manuscript close to B

stemma.description: Hypothetical stemma codicum for the chronicle witnesses

relations.note: beta is a hypothetical lost intermediate
C abbreviates and paraphrases rather than copies faithfully
D may derive from B or from a lost manuscript close to B

text_passage.description: Market fire in Brückstadt, 1298 — fol. 23r in Ms. A

variants.text_diplomatic: do wart ain grozzer brant uf dem markte ze Brugstat
variants.text_normalized: Da ward ein großer Brand auf dem Markt zu Brückstadt

variants.text_diplomatic: da wart ein großer brand uff dem marckte zu Bruckstat
variants.text_normalized: Da ward ein großer Brand auf dem Markt zu Brückstadt

marginal_note.text: anno domini MCCXCVIII in vigilia sancti Martini
marginal_note.significance: Second hand adds precise dating (November 10, 1298) from an unknown source

variants.text_diplomatic: es brante der markt von Bruckstat
variants.text_normalized: Es brannte der Markt von Brückstadt
variants.note: Paraphrased and abbreviated — transforms passive construction to active

variants.text_diplomatic: Da ward ein grosser Brand auff dem Marckt zu Brueckstatt
variants.text_normalized: Da ward ein großer Brand auf dem Markt zu Brückstadt
variants.note: Early New High German spelling modernization by printer

substantive_variants.description: C paraphrases the passage, losing the passive construction and the size descriptor 'grozzer'
Second hand adds precise date from unknown source

carrier.description: Ms. A: parchment codex, 84 folios, 28x20cm, textura script, leather binding over wooden boards
carrier.unique_properties: Red ink for proper names, blue initials for chapter starts

content.description: Brückstädter Chronik, narrative of city history from founding to ca. 1340

example.note: The same informational content appears across four different physical carriers. Each carrier adds its own layer of information (material, script, additions).
